chunks.text: c ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.D-7250 of 2018 @ T Date Order with signature of the Judge For hearing of main case 07.04.2025. None present for petitioner. No one is present on behalf of petitioner. No intimation is received. This petition has not been persuaded by the petitioner and his counsel as required. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE a
